nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Wild Turkey
nodes.summary: Wild Turkey是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Wild Turkey。

nodes.name: Wild Turkey
nodes.summary: A wild turkey is a heavy North American gamebird. Wild Turkey may also refer to: Wild Turkey (bourbon), a brand of whiskey Wild Turkey (band), a 1970s rock band formed by former Jethro Tull bassist Glenn Cornick and Gentle Giant drummer John Weathers The act of rolling six consecutive strikes (bowling)
